title: Turtle Leads
description: This mod allows you to use the lead on turtles!
body:
[![Logo](https://img1.wsimg.com/isteam/ip/b3784fc8-73a8-4ed5-9033-feb6c6f2806c/blob-19e676c.png/:/rs=w:149,h:149,cg:true,m/cr=w:149,h:149/qt=q:95)](https://exlinemods.com/)

Explore Exline Mods for top-notch gaming accessories and mods. Elevate your gaming experience with our high-quality products. Visit exlinemods.com now to gear up and enhance your gameplay!

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/993245467162972220?color=blue&label=Discord&style=plastic&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/9UVGJGyqbv)

This mod allows you to use the lead on turtles! Bring them wherever you want to go.
Only for Fabric 1.19.4 for now, more versions may come soon.

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7eNQiosN/images/bac7358bb768580ec323c08c950cabc86ced7c64.png)
